pages.text: Turrets fire on their own. By default they need no ammo.$(br2)If a modpack enables the $(o)require ammo$() option, open a turret's GUI and stock its ammo slots. Stocked turrets only fire while they have ammo, and fired arrows can be picked back up.$(br2)The facing page lists which ammo each turret takes.

pages.title: Turret Ammo
pages.text: Arrow turrets fire $(item)Arrows$(). Fireball and ghast turrets use $(item)Fire Charges$(); snow turrets use $(item)Snowballs$().
